name: airwatch-web
_dev_tools_note: openapi-typescript is invoked via `npx` in the generate:api-types script rather than being pinned in dependencies — the tool's peerDependencies require TypeScript ^5 but this project uses ^6, so listing it as a normal dep would force `--legacy-peer-deps` for every install (which would then mask other peer regressions). npx fetches it on demand into a sandbox; nothing in the production runtime ever sees it.
_size_budget_note: Bundle budget is enforced by scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs which splits chunks into 'core' (every-user code) and 'lazy 3D' (Cesium for /globe, deck.gl for /replay/3d) buckets with separate budgets. Run `npm run size` after a build to validate. See the script header for the rationale.
_overrides_note: next@16.2.6 vendors postcss@8.4.31 which has an XSS via unescaped </style> in CSS stringify (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93, patched in 8.5.10). Next has no newer stable release that updates the vendored postcss yet, so we force the safe version here. Both `overrides` (npm) AND `pnpm.overrides` are needed because the lockfile is generated by pnpm but Dependabot scans the npm-style block. Drop both once next ships with postcss >= 8.5.10.
_optional_deps_note: lightningcss-* native bins are pulled by lightningcss itself via its own optionalDependencies; we mirror the per-platform list here so a fresh `npm ci` on any host gets a working build. Without this, Windows installs miss the win32-x64 native and the dev server bombs at first compile with 'Cannot find module ../lightningcss.win32-x64-msvc.node'.
